mapper.select: SELECT role_id, role_nm, ognz_se_cd_allowed, role_desc, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id FROM com.tn_role WHERE NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt ORDER BY role_id

SELECT role_id, role_nm, ognz_se_cd_allowed, role_desc, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id FROM com.tn_role WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO com.tn_role (role_id, role_nm, ognz_se_cd_allowed, role_desc, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{roleNm}, #{ognzSeCdAllowed}, #{roleDesc}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE com.tn_role SET role_nm = #{roleNm}, ognz_se_cd_allowed = #{ognzSeCdAllowed}, role_desc = #{roleDesc}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
